title: Ma non è una cosa seria
writer: Augusto Camerini, Arnaldo Frateili, Luigi Pirandello
actors: Carmen Boni, Romano Calò, Ignazio Lupi
plot: Theatrical adaptation: Frivolous urban playboy Memmo inoculates himself against pressures to marry by setting up a wedding, in name only, with a humble servant girl who will stay out in the countryside.
